tagline: Sync journal entries into the encyclopedia.
longDescription:
The processing layer underneath the Encyclopedia. Reads new journal entries (incremental by default, full-rebuild on request) and routes their contents into the eight modular source files: people, places, beliefs, work, goals, references, etc. Applies file-specific update rules, deduplicates, surfaces conflicts for your approval, and never writes without confirming.

Invoked automatically at the end of every daily journaling session by `journaling-assistant` so the encyclopedia stays current without you thinking about it, but you can also run it directly — "update my encyclopedia", "sync the encyclopedia", "add a goal" — when you've made changes outside the daily-journaling flow. Safe to re-run; idempotent by design.
